title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 404.855 - Liability, immunity from, when
text:
404.855.  Liability, immunity from, when. — A third person, if acting in good faith, may rely and act on the instruction of and deal with the attorney in fact acting pursuant to the authority granted in a power of attorney for health care without liability to the patient or the patient's successors in interest.
(L. 1991 S.B. 148)
